system.description: A swarm is a collection of Fine, Diminutive, or Tiny creatures that acts as a single creature. It occupies a 10 ft. square (or cube if flying), has reach 0 ft., and moves into opponents’ spaces to attack. It is immune to critical hits and flanking; weapon damage depends on constituent size; it is immune to single-target effects that target a specific number of creatures (with exceptions for mind-affecting effects if it has Intelligence and a hive mind); and it takes +50% damage from area effects. See the SRD for swarm attack damage by HD, distraction, and wind rules.
